commit.message:
Fix multiplayer move confirmation button not appearing

The Confirm button was hidden after making all moves because the
backgammon core sets dice=null when movesRemaining is exhausted.
The CenterControls wrapper condition `isMyTurn && dice` evaluated
to false, hiding both Undo and Confirm buttons. Fixed by also
showing the button area when canEndTurn is true (pendingConfirmation).
Also fixed the Z key undo shortcut which had the same dice!==null guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

via navigator.modelContext when available.

commit.message:
feat: add TaskRunner widget for background task visualization (v1.8.0 4/5)

Background task runner widget for parallel operation status indicator.
Integrates with AsyncEventLoop for thread-based task management.

Features:
- TaskInfo tracking (handle, name, state, progress, error)
- Display formats: compact, normal, detailed
- Status symbols (Unicode/ASCII)
- Progress bars for running tasks
- Error message display for failed tasks
- Task selection/navigation (next/prev)
- State-based coloring (pending/running/completed/cancelled/failed)
- Elapsed time formatting (seconds/minutes/hours)
- Optional block border/title
- Clear finished tasks utility

Implementation:
- 20 comprehensive tests (add/update/fail/clear/navigation/render)
- Exported from tui.zig
- Writer-based rendering, no stdout usage
- Memory-safe with explicit allocator usage

v1.8.0 milestone: 4/5 complete (HTTP, WebSocket, AsyncEventLoop, TaskRunner ✓)
Next: Log viewer widget (tail -f style with filtering)

fix(availability): check equipment conflicts when generating available slots

Equipment availability was only validated at booking creation time, causing
slots to appear available even when required equipment was already booked.
Now fetches equipment_bookings for the requested day and filters out
conflicting slots before returning them to the client.

Add Firebase Auth + cloud data sync

- Optional Google Sign-In (app works without login)
- Firebase-first data layer when signed in, localStorage as fallback
- Write-through: every save writes to both localStorage and Firebase
- First-login migration: auto-uploads localStorage to cloud
- Per-user data isolation under labelkeeper/{uid}/
- Device-specific settings (storeId, deviceRole) stay local
- Auth UI in header (sign-in button / user avatar)
- Cloud Account section in settings modal
- clearAllData() also clears cloud data

fix: prevent webhook from overwriting tier after refund

The subscription_updated webhook (fired when cancel_subscription is
called) was racing with the refund handler and re-setting the tier
back to the paid plan. Now webhooks skip processing for users whose
subscription_status is "refunded".

commit.message:
fix: add SSE keepalive pings during AI calls to prevent proxy timeouts

Long-running AI calls (DeepSeek V3, Claude) can take 30-60s+ with no SSE
events sent, causing Cloudflare/Traefik to drop the connection. Sends a
keepalive ping every 15s to maintain the stream.

improve logging: retry visibility, failure context, handler dedup

- Fix handler duplication in PipelineLogger: guard addHandler with `if not self.logger.handlers` so re-instantiation doesn't double log lines
- Log every retry in _request_with_retry with attempt number, total attempts, status code (or exception), delay, and URL — previously all retries were silent
- Add product/ratio/provider to the failure exception log in process_campaign so failed generations are immediately identifiable without tracing back through prior INFO lines
- Include product, aspect ratio, and resolved size in the "Generating via..." log line
- Add provider name to _create_generator error log

commit.message:
Fix favicon.ico conflict between public/ and app/ directories

Next.js App Router automatically serves src/app/favicon.ico as a route.
Having public/favicon.ico simultaneously caused a 500 on every page load.
Removed the public/ copy; the app/ one remains as the canonical favicon.

fix: remove .claude/settings.local.json from git tracking

File contained admin secret in CLI permission entries.

Secret should be rotated since it was exposed in git history.

CR-9: Replace "If your application is approved," with "Next," on adoption-information page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add enforce_safe_state() — unified pod reset for crashes, disconnects, and session end

Replaces scattered cleanup_after_session() calls with a single enforce_safe_state()
that kills ALL game processes (AC, F1 25, iRacing, LMU, Forza), restarts Conspit Link,
and resets the lock screen. Also adds a 30s crash recovery timer: if game crashes during
active billing and core doesn't send SessionEnded, the pod force-resets to safe state.

Triggered on: startup, session end, sub-session end, game crash (no billing), disconnect
(no billing), and crash recovery timeout (30s, during billing).

commit.message:
Fix schedule navigation: remove Tooltip interference, add week nav to dashboard

- CalendarHeader: remove Tooltip wrappers from nav arrows (could block clicks),
  use plain title attributes instead, increase arrow button size for easier clicking
- UpcomingAppointmentsWidget: add chevron arrows for week navigation so users
  can navigate forward/backward from the dashboard without switching to calendar view
- Also shows booking source labels (Web, Phone, Manual, Square) on each booking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: iOS app icon — opaque RGB, regenerate directly into appiconset

The AppIcon-512@2x.png in the Xcode asset catalog contained a broken
image (white corners, black fill) because the previous RGBA source was
incorrectly stripped of its alpha channel with a white background.

Fixes:
- generate-icon.js: add flattenToRGB() to composite the RGBA icon onto
  the dark navy background (#060a2e) before encoding, producing a correct
  opaque RGB PNG. Add rgbPngEntry() encoder (colorType 2, no alpha).
  Now auto-writes directly to ios/App/.../AppIcon.appiconset/ in addition
  to assets/icon-1024.png, so running `node assets/generate-icon.js`
  keeps both in sync.
- icon-1024.png: regenerated as opaque RGB (hasAlpha: no) — Apple App
  Store and Xcode both require app icons with no alpha channel.

The iOS AppIcon.appiconset was also updated directly (local fix,
ios/ is gitignored). The Contents.json single-icon format is correct
for Xcode 14+ (idiom:universal, platform:ios, size:1024x1024).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add pyarrow as explicit dependency

polars.DataFrame.to_pandas() requires pyarrow at runtime but it was not
declared in project dependencies. This caused 17 test failures on clean
environments. CatBoost requires pandas input, so the conversion cannot
be avoided without a CatBoost API change.

commit.message:
Fix WinLossChart: base bars on actual P&L, improve Y-axis visibility

Bar color and direction now based on actual profit/loss (payout minus
deployed), not the win/loss flag. A round where you survive but lose
money to fees now correctly shows as a red bar.

Y-axis labels moved outside chart area, increased to 10px, color-coded
green/red to match profit/loss, with a labeled zero line.

commit.message:
Update dependencies: security patches and minor/patch bumps

- Upgrade Next.js 15.5.9 → 15.5.12 (fixes high-severity DoS via Image
  Optimizer and insecure RSC deserialization — GHSA-9g9p, GHSA-h25m)
- Remove unused jspdf and @types/jspdf (jspdf was never imported; its
  bundled dompurify <3.2.4 had a moderate XSS — GHSA-vhxf-7vqr-mrjg)
- Update all @radix-ui/* packages to latest minor versions
- Update genkit/genkit-cli/genkit-ai packages 1.20 → 1.29
- Update react + react-dom 19.2.1 → 19.2.4
- Update react-hook-form 7.54 → 7.71, react-day-picker 9.11 → 9.14
- Update tailwind-merge 3.0 → 3.5, typescript 5.7 → 5.9
- Update postcss, patch-package, @types/node, @types/react (patch bumps)
- Remaining 21 low-severity vulns are in firebase-admin/@google-cloud
  dependency chain; fix requires downgrading firebase-admin to v10 (skip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf(credentials): skip decryption on list endpoint for faster load

listByService() no longer decrypts credential configs — secrets should
not be returned in list responses. The no-arg CredentialResponse
constructor returns an empty config map. Removed the Details column
from the credentials UI since config data is no longer available there.
